name: Creamy Carob Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Amish Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
1/2 cup Ricotta Cheese -OR- Low-fat Cottage Cheese
1 tsp Vanilla Extract -OR- 1/2 tsp Almond Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients to form a crumb mixture. Set aside.
2. Beat together the remaining ingredients in a separate bowl.
3. Place half of the crumb mixture into an oiled 9-inch x 12-inch pan, pressing down well.
4. Spread the carob mixture over the top of the crumb layer.
5. Cover with the remaining crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Suggestion: If the crumb mixture does not stick together, add a little oil.
